title: Electrician minor shock and hand numbness
transcript: Good afternoon, this is Caleb Morris from Summit Electrical Services. I need to report a workers compensation incident. At around 9:15 AM on Friday I received a minor electrical shock while testing a panel at a commercial site. I did not lose consciousness, but my right hand felt numb afterward. My site lead instructed me to go to the ER for evaluation and they discharged me with follow-up instructions. Please return my call so I can provide records and complete the claim process.
